name: craft
description: Senior-engineer guardrails that stop AI coding agents from shipping slop. Ten plugin skills (nine composable guardrails + the production-grade router), an always-on rules constitution, and a /senior-review gate with an execution-evidence Definition of Done. Forces strategic (durable) code over tactical (fast-but-disposable) code, grounded in The Pragmatic Programmer, Fowler's Refactoring, Ousterhout's A Philosophy of Software Design, and empirical AI-code-quality research.

author.name: CETI — Center for Educational Technology Innovations
